name: 06_vwap_is_zero_skipped
description: Holding present in live_vwaps but vwap == 0.0 -> the `if v > 0:` guard skips the contribution (would otherwise divide by zero).
derivation: AAPL is in live_vwaps; v=0.0. The producer's `if v > 0:` guard fails (0.0 is not strictly greater than 0). Inner block (both the diff accumulation AND the valid_vwap_weight += alloc) is skipped. Note: valid_vwap_weight increment lives INSIDE the `if v > 0:` block, so a v <= 0 holding contributes NOTHING to either accumulator. Final: (0.0, 0.0).
